scripts.build: node --preserve-symlinks -e "import('vite').then(async ({ build }) => { const react = (await import('@vitejs/plugin-react')).default; await build({ configFile: false, resolve: { preserveSymlinks: true }, plugins: [react()], build: { sourcemap: false, rollupOptions: { output: { manualChunks: { firebase: ['firebase/app','firebase/auth','firebase/firestore'], motion: ['framer-motion'] } } } } }); })"
